flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Benedictine College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.6k → $36.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Benedictine College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.6k → $36.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Benedictine College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
